title: Catkids Better Vanilla
description: This modpack is made to make the vanilla experience better, but still playable in vanilla servers.
body:
I made this modpack because I was ... _slightly board_ of the normal gameplay and I knew of some great mods for vanilla gameplay. there a quite a lot of mods and resource packs and I will add more when I have good ideas for it. "Fresh Moves" needs you to add a few extra pixels to your skin PNG for the eyes to acualy move so [heres a wiki for that](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki) "Just Expressions" needs that to work. here is a quick overview of the modpack

![tasty items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ezM3eujR/images/2a73fdc467948786be9c2ba23fd38b74c1835369_350.webp)![apple skins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ezM3eujR/images/5ba4bc55b86be43e616f0a939d9ccc196d59d6c2.png)![continuity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ezM3eujR/images/3059519fcddaf2de53d727b87fca0b4d97d6b458_350.webp)![fresh moves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ezM3eujR/images/d892a4a514098042a3ec8272f4465c82565b5ec2_350.webp)![not enough animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ezM3eujR/images/51c931d938c4851f6e7d121bb98f65c699580cb6_350.webp)
